hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if re.search(r'(?:^|&&|;)\s*cd\s', cmd) and '(cd ' not in cmd:
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': 'Use (cd /path && cmd) subshell syntax, not bare cd'}))
    sys.exit(0)
"
